column1: # Tracked unknowns for this board — imported by annotate.py into open_questions
# and rendered by report.py, so they stay visible in every RE report rather than
# living only in the issue tracker.
# Columns: issue_num  title  description  status  related_nets(JSON)  related_cells(JSON)  blocker

column2: Package RESOLVED to QN48; apicula table incompleteness remains
column3: PACKAGE IDENTITY IS SETTLED: the device is a Gowin GW1N-UV2 in the standard QN48 package (48-pin QFN 6x6mm, ordering code like GW1N-UV2QN48C6/I5, NOT QN48H), physically confirmed from the chip marking on 2026-06-13 and documented in the OpenScope-2C53T programming guide; IDCODE 0x0120681B corroborates GW1N-2. The board now uses QFN48X, the nearest apicula proxy (apicula ships no QN48), which places IOR1B — the master run/re-arm pin — at pin 35, matching the confirmed pinout exactly. This retired the earlier LQFP100 choice, which was a pre-ground-truth coverage heuristic and did not bond IOR1B at all. RESIDUAL: apicula's QFN48X table bonds only 14 of 23 real pads and omits some the design drives, and IOT3A is routed yet unbonded in every GW1N-2 table — so the tables are incomplete relative to the real QN48. Pin numbers are proxy-confirmed where both cover a pad, not exhaustive; unbonded pads stay recoverable by name (source=gowin_iob_unbonded).
column7: upstream: a complete/corrected GW1N-2 QN48 package table in apicula

column2: FPGA-side SPI command set recovered; physical meanings still open
column3: RECOVERED (see docs/re/openscope_2c53t_spi_commands.md): command width is 8 bits via an 8-stage gated shift chain off SI; the opcode field is the low 5 bits latched into the ff_r15c9/ff_r15c10 bank (load CE n2156); 8 opcodes decode (0x01 0x02 0x04 0x05 0x06 0x07 0x08 0x09), each gating a named register bank; the SO readback is an 8:1 GW1N wide-mux (MUX2_LUT52/53/61 -> R17C12_OF5) over 8 latched bits selected by the ff_r16c10 3-bit counter, and 40 BSRAM DO nets reach every mux input, closing the old BRAM->SO gap. SPI-mode dispute RESOLVED as malformed: zero DFFN* flops means the fabric samples on the rising edge, and Mode 0 and Mode 3 BOTH sample on the rising edge, so a slave cannot distinguish them (they differ only in CPOL, a master-side property). STILL OPEN: the physical meaning of each register (which analog parameter, units, encoding) is not derivable from a static netlist; the decode is only 5 bits so opcodes alias modulo 32 and any host command in 0x20-0x2C needs hardware checking; and it is unproven that the shift chain's clock (global spine GB00) is SCLK, because the GOWIN clock spine has no decoded origin.
column7: hardware: dynamic SPI capture to attach physical meaning; engine: lift the GW1N wide-mux bels and resolve the clock spine
